name: Mike & Sarah Brennan
quote: Summit Builders transformed our 1970s ranch into a modern family home. They were transparent about costs, stuck to the timeline, and the craftsmanship is incredible. We've already recommended them to three neighbors.

name: David Chen
quote: Our restaurant buildout was complex — full kitchen, HVAC, ADA compliance — and Summit handled it all. They finished a week early and under budget.

name: Jennifer Walsh
quote: Adding a second story to our cape cod felt daunting, but Summit made it seamless. The addition looks like it was always part of the original house.
